articles.title: Bengal, Tamil Nadu assembly elections vote time, voting percentage, result date | Know key details
articles.description: In West Bengal, 294 seats are up for the contest and that for Tamil Nadu is 234, making 148 and 118 the majority mark for both the states, respectively.

articles.title: IMD forecasts heatwave for Delhi, minimum temperature 2.7°C above normal

topStories.title: US-Iran war LIVE: Iran fires on 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz - Does it violate ceasefire terms? US says…
topStories.description: US-Iran War LIVE: The standoff between the United States and Iran has effectively disrupted almost all exports through the Strait of Hormuz, a route that normally carries about 20 per cent of global oil trade in peacetime—with no clear resolution in sight. Get US-Iran War LIVE Updates here on Mint!

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 23): Crude oil prices cross $100 again as Iran war ceasefire talks show no progress. $120 in sight?
topStories.description: Oil prices are rising again. Peace talks between Iran and the United States are stalled. Trade through the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted. Iran seized two ships in the strait. The US maintains its naval blockade. Analysts predict prices could stay high. Disruptions may push Brent prices even higher. The market faces ongoing uncertainty.

topStories.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says

topStories.description: The remarks came during the hearing of petitions filed by ED and its officers under Article 32 seeking a probe by the CBI into the alleged obstruction.

topStories.description: Jose Lopez-Montoya, an illegal immigrant from Honduras, pleaded guilty to raping and impregnating a 12-year-old relative and faces up to 99 years in prison.

topStories.description: Curt Cignetti says he is "95% football" after leading Indiana to an undefeated National Championship season, turning down nearly all speaking engagements.
